post.content: For duplicate, we can remove the oldest entry.  Map should maintain the list of nodes in LinkedList `Map<String, Queue<Node>>`
It's impossible. For example when you're asked whether the cache contains a string and it does, you need to look at all characters of the string to be sure. That's not constant time.

Python Version of Code:
```
class Node:
    def __init__(self, v):
        self.val = v
        self.prev = None
        self.next = None


class Cache:
    def __init__(self, capacity):
        self.capacity = capacity
        self.dic = dict()
        self.head = None
        self.tail = None
        self.size = 0

    def add(self, element):
        if self.size == self.capacity:
            node_to_remove = self.head
            #Remove From List
            self._removeFromList(node_to_remove)
            #Remove From Dict/Map
            nodes = self.dic[node_to_remove.val]
            if node_to_remove in nodes:
                nodes.remove(node_to_remove)
            if len(nodes) == 0:
                del self.dic[node_to_remove.val]
        node = Node(element)
        #Add Node to LinkedList
        self._addLast(node)
        #Add Node to Map
        nodes = self.dic.get(element, None)
        if nodes:
            nodes.append(node)
        else:
            nodes = []
            nodes.append(node)
            self.dic[element] = nodes


    def _removeFromList(self, ntr):
        if ntr == self.head and ntr == self.tail:
            self.head = self.tail = None
        elif ntr == self.head:
            self.head = self.head.next
            self.head.prev = None
        elif ntr == self.tail:
            self.tail = self.tail.prev
            self.tail.next = None
        else:
            ntr.prev.next = ntr.next
            ntr.next.prev = ntr.prev
        self.size -= 1

    def _addLast(self, node):
        if self.tail == None:
            self.head = self.tail = node
        else:
            self.tail.next = node
            node.prev = self.tail
            self.tail = node
        self.size += 1

    def remove(self, element):
        nodes = self.dic[element]
        if nodes:
            #Remove from Map
            del self.dic[element]
            #Remove from List
            for node in nodes:
                self._removeFromList(node)

    def contains(self, element):
        if element in self.dic:
            return True
        else:
            return False


if __name__:
    c = Cache(2)
    c.add(10)
    c.add(20)
    c.add(30)
    c.add(40)
    c.remove(30)
    c.add(50)
    assert False == c.contains(10)
    assert False == c.contains(20)
    assert False == c.contains(30)
    assert True == c.contains(40)
    assert True == c.contains(50)
```
